details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia page, extracted data from the accessibility tree showing the actual table content, and correctly reported the 3 most recent years (2023, 2024, 2025) with accurate laureate names matching what was visible in the page snapshot: 2023 (Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier), 2024 (John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton), and 2025 (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis).
